title: bpftune  bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
bpftune
[0.4-2.el10]
- Merge pull request #225 from oracle/0.4

[0.4-2]
- Minimize overheads, cleanups, test reliability. [Orabug: 38757036]

[0.3-2]
- Add udp tuner, query support

[0.2-1]
- Add support for PCP PMDA package

[0.1-3]
- Fix timeout retry logic in libbpftune. [Orabug: 35385703]

[0.1-2]
- Spec file reviewed.

[0.1-1]
- Initial packaging support

libbpf
[2:1.6.0-2]
- Update to kernel rebase 6.14
- Resolves: RHEL-78917

[2:1.6.0-1]
- Update to kernel rebase 6.13
- Resolves: RHEL-91129

[2:1.5.0-4]
- Rebuild after kernel rebase to 6.12
- Resolves: RHEL-63890

[2:1.5.0-3]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[2:1.5.0-2]
- Rebase to released RHEL 10 Beta kernel
- Resolves: RHEL-36077

[2:1.5.0-1]
- Rebase to upstream kernel 6.10
- keep FD_CLOEXEC flag when dup()'ing FD
- Resolves: RHEL-37631

[2:1.4.0-3]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[2:1.4.0-1]
- Rebuild from latest RHEL 10.0 Beta source tree
- Resolves: RHEL-30627

[2:1.2.0-3]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_40_Mass_Rebuild

[2:1.2.0-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_40_Mass_Rebuild
